Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class Incident

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.Incident
public class Incident extends SObject

Java class for Incident complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="Incident">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ActivityHistories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AttachedContentDocuments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Attachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BusinessHours" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}BusinessHours" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BusinessHoursId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CaseRelatedIssues" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Category" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChangeRequestRelatedIssues" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChildIncidents" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CombinedAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentDocumentLinks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DetectedDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Emails" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Entitlement" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Entitlement" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EntitlementId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EntityMilestones" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Events" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FeedSubscriptionsForEntity" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Feeds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Histories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Impact" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IncidentNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IncidentRelatedItems" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsClosed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsMajorIncident" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsStopped" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastReferencedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastViewedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LookedUpFromActivities" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MilestoneStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Notes" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NotesAndAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OpenActivities" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Owner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentIncident" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Incident" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentIncidentId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Priority" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PriorityOverrideReason" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProblemIncidentRelatedIssues" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProblemIncidents" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActionHistories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReportedMethod" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ResolutionDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ResolutionSummary" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ResolvedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ResolvedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Shares" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SlaExitDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SlaStartDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StartDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StatusCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StopStartDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SubCategory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Subject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Tasks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TopicAssignments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Urgency" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

      public void setUserRecordAccess(UserRecordAccess value)
      Sets the value of the userRecordAccess property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is UserRecordAccess
